title: Seahorse
original_title: Seahorse: The Dad Who Gave Birth
overview: Director Jeanie Finlay charts a transgender man's path to parenthood after he decides to carry his child himself. The pregnancy prompts an unexpected and profound reckoning with conventions of masculinity, self-definition and biology.

trailers.title: Seahorse: The Dad Who Gave Birth - Official Trailer
"If all men got pregnant, it'd be taken so much more seriously" - behind the scenes of Seahorse
